'''Darby Willers''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] action star. She attended the annual [[Spira Regatta Open]] [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] race in [[Ataria City]]. There, she was spotted by the media attending [[Aneash Maglea]]'s private reception prior to the race while wearing her noted [[firegem]] tiara.
